title: Lesson Types
subtitle: Choose the lesson that matches your level and goals

beginner.name: Beginner Vietnamese
beginner.description: Perfect for those starting their Vietnamese journey. Learn the alphabet, tones, basic grammar, and essential vocabulary step by step.

intermediate.name: Intermediate Vietnamese
intermediate.description: Enhance your listening and reading comprehension on specific topics. Build more complex sentences and expand your vocabulary.

conversation.name: Daily Conversation
conversation.description: Practice real Vietnamese through free-topic conversations. Improve your fluency, natural expressions, and confidence in speaking.
